headline: Starbucks Union Proposes New Contract Terms, Looks to Reopen Negotiations
summary: Starbucks Workers United said that it is requesting a contract with a minimum starting wage of $17 an hour, plus 4% annual raises.

raw.headline: Starbucks Union Proposes New Contract Terms, Looks to Reopen Negotiations
raw.summary: Starbucks Workers United said that it is requesting a contract with a minimum starting wage of $17 an hour, plus 4% annual raises.

headline: Starbucks union sent the company a proposed contract. Here's what baristas want
summary: Discussions between Starbucks and the union representing about 6% of its company-owned U.S. stores hit a wall last year.

raw.headline: Starbucks union sent the company a proposed contract. Here's what baristas want
